title: tricalysia niamniamensis subsp. niamniamensis
intro: Tricalysia niamniamensis subsp. niamniamensis, also known as the Niamniambo tree, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant has been reported to possess health benefits such as wound healing, pain relief, and fever reduction, among others. In traditional medicine, Tricalysia niamniamensis subsp. niamniamensis is often prepared into various herbal formulations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, for its medicinal uses.
